title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.330 - Offices of marshal and collector may be consolidated
text:
79.330.  Offices of marshal and collector may be consolidated. — The board of aldermen may by ordinance provide that hereafter the same person shall hold the offices of marshal and collector, in which case his official title shall be "marshal and ex officio collector".
(RSMo 1939 § 7225) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7075; 1919 § 8525; 1909 § 9426 
Marshal to be chief of police--powers and duties, 85.610
